reviews.review_description: I bowl sometimes but since I play 3 other sports I don’t always have time during the day. But I can easily play Unlimited Bowling in my vr when I get home! The only thing I recommend is more areas to bowl instead of that little room like a pba place or like a new alley. That’s it but it’s amazing
This game is the best in the world! Love the 100 pin bowling and love the YouTube wall. Definitely recommend!

reviews.review_title: Not worth it for it's price
reviews.review_description: I know I got this game for free but I can't even play with anyone because the price went up. If you going to put a price on a free game at least put updates on the game.

reviews.review_title: It would be great except 4 1 serious bug
reviews.review_description: Sometimes when you go to your boundary edge the boundary screen will pop up and not go away the only way to make it go away is to reboot your entire system reboot your headset or you're sitting there trying to bowl inside a screen just stays up for your boundary.
I cannot get the pins to reset
I love this game it is very real and fun. I think yall need to add a pro shop were you can make you own balls then it would be even better
This game is really awesome if your a good bowler irl or just a beginner but I highly recommend that you get this game. I tried it today and I loved it!

I think it’s the greatest game graphics are good. Not a bad game.

reviews.review_title: This game is great I would recommend
reviews.review_description: This game is a great game the grafics are nice and it kind of reminds me of wii because of the 100 pins mode this game is way better then premium bowling don’t buy premium get this ist the same thing
The games hook physics and roll physics are not good at all and public servers some people take all of the lanes the really only good part is the fact that there is youtube
You just need to get used to the way that it works but other than that I see a lot of playtime in my future

This game is pretty good for bowling. Other games like rec room have some trash bowling physics, but this one is pretty good! I like how there's different pin designs and multiple bowling ball designs. It's also a nice touch how there's a YouTube wall and you can play whatever music you want. The only thing I don't like is the barren walls. Bowling alleys usually have cool designs on the walls, and these are just plain white. It would be cool to see some neon designs on a black background. Although, if it were up to me, I'd add a blackout feature. Like neon glow-in-the-dark paint on the walls along with glowing pins and bowling balls, all with the normal lights being off. Other than that, this game is pretty good for relaxing and just playing some bowling. I'd recommend it.
Please add the option to teleport! Gliding give me motion sickness.  The game would be perfect if I could teleport.

reviews.review_title: This game is just so fun
reviews.review_description: I give this a 5 bc of a lot of reasons mostly because you can put like ur fav song or watch a video on the big screen like in bowling irl they have to modes my fav mode is the 100 pins mode it’s basically well u already know and the controls are very easy and it’s a 2 player game so u can play with your friend but one thing I don’t like is this little glitch thing maybe it’s only me where when I roll the ball while the ball is rolling not even mid way it randomly disappears but it appears back with the other balls but it’s only happened to me once but over all just a very fun game in general

I have been playing this game for a while since it kinda came out and it’s really good and it’s a game that will make you loose track of time and comparing it to premium bowling their both really good games
They need to add two handed bowling because I have heard people complain about that.
This game is amazing it’s cheap and a good game and it couldn’t get any better there are no glitches and multiplayer work
